content:
Decided to take more profits from my Swing Short on $BTC after catching a 25k drop without taking any partials along the way.

The reason for taking profits here is simple: the trend is showing clear exhaustion, and we’re now retesting the previous All-Time High. There’s a high
$BTC will be around 37,638 by October 5, 2026.

We saw a strong rejection from the 104.5k region, leading to a push down towards 101.2k for sweeping liquidity below those lows.

The Equal Lows around 98.8k remain my target, but we’re likely to get some bearish pullbacks along the way. I’m
130,150.2 next for $BTC until proven otherwise.

A Sweep of the high is on the table, I'll add if we get acceptance below after the sweep.
$BTC needs to hold this FVG for continuation.

$BTC Scenarios: 

 Rejection From 112.1k-112.5k will give us a retest of daily FVG at 110.4k-109.8k

 If it breaks the previous daily high than the next target for shorts will be 113.6k. It is an Important HTF resistance level for bearish continuation.

 Holding the daily

$BTC | HTF Outlook

Expecting a move down to 91.6k–85.1k by the end of the month, which should complete our Corrective Wave C. This would likely set up December–January for some relief to the upside before another push lower.

For now, price is holding the previous low at

Dumping on the Daily Open/Asia Open is usually a

SL is at BE on both, Take some profits here if you followed.

$ETH | Market Update & Short Ideas

After completing Wave 5 at 4754, we’re now inside a corrective phase. I’m expecting an ABC correction towards 2879 in the coming months.

Currently, price is hovering around the low-confluence zone (4077-4144). Considering it’s month-end, a

If you're holding the short with me, Take this long with half the size of your short.

$BTC | HTF Update

We’ve cleared some upside liquidity after holding above 101k. As of now a strong bearish engulfing candle is forming after rejecting our first key resistance and liquidity zone.

For this move to extend to the downside, we need to see a clean break below

Perfect Snipe on $BTC 

We're at the first TP level, Take some profits and put SL at BE.

Institutions are offloading $BTC while selling the dream of higher prices to retailers and using them as exit liquidity. The cycles haven’t changed, We’re just in that phase where retailers are overly bullish while institutions quietly sell into the hype.

$BTC Long is a hedge against our short.

If the Long gets stopped out, we're going to tap 108k-106k region, Good for the short. 

If we start holding above 112k, I'll take heavier profits from the short and hold the long towards the TP's.

Risk free either way.

Removing these limits on $ETH. 

Looking for a fresh one.

Not my personal bias or opinion, It’s what the chart indicates. 

For this to be invalid, $BTC would have to do something it has never done before.

There are three patterns that I’ve highlighted so we can be prepared for what’s next if history repeats itself.

It’s all right
